StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 扫码.Method.ConnectBarcodeScanner(192.168.1.20:8088); IN4304000162.Part.扫码次数=0;

StatusUnit.Name: CHECKFAIL
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: IN4304000162.Part.扫码次数=0;

StatusUnit.Name: 产品1扫码
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: IN4304000162.Part.扫码次数=1;

StatusUnit.Name: 码1判断
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 检测程序.Field.Bstring13=扫码.Field.GetBarcodeStr;

StatusUnit.Name: 码2判断
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 检测程序.Field.Bstring14=扫码.Field.GetBarcodeStr; IN4304000162.Part.扫码次数=0;

StatusUnit.Name: IDLE
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 倍速链交互.Method.InitClient(192.168.2.220:261); 倍速链交互.Field.RemoteSqlIp=192.168.2.220;

StatusUnit.Name: 读启动信号
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 倍速链交互.Field.ReadySignal=1;

StatusUnit.Name: 启动
工位1OK
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 倍速链交互.Field.LoadPlateProduct1CompleteState=1;

StatusUnit.Name: 工位2OK
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 倍速链交互.Field.LoadPlateProduct2CompleteState=1;

StatusUnit.Name: 工位3OK
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 倍速链交互.Field.LoadPlateProduct3CompleteState=1;

StatusUnit.Name: 工位4OK
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 倍速链交互.Field.LoadPlateProduct4CompleteState=1;

StatusUnit.Name: 工位1NG
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 倍速链交互.Field.LoadPlateProduct1CompleteState=0;

StatusUnit.Name: 工位2NG
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 倍速链交互.Field.LoadPlateProduct2CompleteState=0;

StatusUnit.Name: 工位3NG
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 倍速链交互.Field.LoadPlateProduct3CompleteState=0;

StatusUnit.Name: 工位4NG
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 倍速链交互.Field.LoadPlateProduct4CompleteState=0;

StatusUnit.Name: 发送完成
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 倍速链交互.Field.CompleteSignal=1;

StatusUnit.Name: IDLE
PRESTART
暂停中
报警

Condition.Name: CHECKEND_PRESTART
